steps.title: Keep the examples integrated
steps.content: The phrase the languages Tetum and Fijian identifies which languages are meant. The examples are essential to the noun phrase, so no punctuation should separate them from languages.

steps.title: Reject unnecessary breaks
steps.content: A makes the examples look nonessential, B creates an unnecessary list break, and D creates an abrupt interruption. The restrictive phrase should remain unpunctuated. The answer is C.
